title: YAWAHOME 80 Colors Alcohol Markers Set, Dual Tip Art Pens, Alcohol-Based Marker for Kids & Adult Coloring, Drawing, Sketching, Vibrant No Bleeding Marker for Artists, Illustration Gifts
features: 80Alcohol Markers: This colouring markers includes 80 vibrant colors, provide more options and enhance the versatility of your creative projects

Precise Double Tip Control: Each color paint marker pen features a dual-tip design with a wide chisel tip (6mm) for quick coverage and a fine bullet tip (1mm) for detailed work. The color-coded caps make it easy to quickly identify the colors, allowing you to switch between broad strokes and fine details effortlessly

Advanced Alcohol-Based Ink: These marker pens are filled with high-quality alcohol ink that dries quickly, providing a smooth and even application. The colors are vibrant and long-lasting, resisting fading over time. Although it may bleed through regular paper, it's recommended to use thicker or marker pad, allowing you to achieve stunning and durable artworks

Organized & Portable: The set comes with sturdy storage to keep markers tidy. Color-coded caps protect the dual tip from drying out, making these alcohol pens easy to carry for travel, classes, or a neat workspace.

Versatile Uses for All Ages: Suitable for a wide range of applications, including adult coloring books, design, animation, posters, rendering, and comics. It's also a great gift for kids to unleash their artistic potential and explore their creativity in a fun and engaging way
